title: Introducing AI-Assisted Agreement Summaries and Q&A in Docusign eSignature
heading_path: Introducing AI-Assisted Agreement Summaries and Q&A in Docusign eSignature
text:
Published Jan 13, 2026

---

Summary•3 min read

New AI-enhanced signing features in Docusign eSignature help signers understand agreements faster and with greater confidence, including plain-English summaries of key terms and natural-language Q&A.

![Introducing AI-Assisted Agreement Summaries and Q&A in Docusign eSignature](https://images.ctfassets.net/9pvazpst9iwl/4GaOOO7mBiDV1swkZlR8J6/4a8c8aa772de71b0516301ce79a6d504/AI-Assisted-Agreement-Summary_26-01_Blog_Feature_1200x900_EN.png?fm=avif&q=90&w=500)

- - [AI-assisted agreement summaries](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-agreement-summaries-Q-A#aiassisted-agreement-summaries)
  - [Ask questions, get direct answers](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-agreement-summaries-Q-A#ask-questions-get-direct-answers)

Signing an agreement shouldn’t feel like decoding a foreign language. But for many people, dense legal text creates uncertainty, hesitation, and stress right at the moment when clarity matters most.

We know this is a real problem. Nearly 60%\* of people admit they’ve agreed to terms they didn’t fully understand, and almost half say complex contracts leave them feeling frustrated or anxious. Contrary to the myth that people just “scroll to the bottom,” only 2%\* of signers actually skip or skim agreements. Most people want to understand what they’re signing—they just don’t always have the tools to do so.

That’s changing.

With new AI-enhanced features in Docusign eSignature, signers will start seeing a clearer, more supportive signing experience designed to build confidence and reduce friction.

title: Introducing AI-Assisted Agreement Summaries and Q&A in Docusign eSignature
heading_path: Introducing AI-Assisted Agreement Summaries and Q&A in Docusign eSignature
AI-assisted agreement summaries
text: When you receive an agreement to sign, Docusign can now present a simple, plain-English summary of key terms. Instead of digging through pages of legal language, you’ll get a clear overview of key highlights—so you can review documents faster and feel confident moving forward. Nearly 75%\* of signers say they’d feel more confident with an AI-powered summary, and now it’s built directly into the signing experience.

title: Introducing AI-Assisted Agreement Summaries and Q&A in Docusign eSignature
heading_path: Introducing AI-Assisted Agreement Summaries and Q&A in Docusign eSignature
Ask questions, get direct answers
text:
Every agreement comes with questions. Now, you can ask them directly. Using natural-language Q&A, signers can type questions like *“What happens if I need to cancel?”* or *“What are my payment obligations?”* and receive clear, agreement-specific answers—without searching through dense text or second-guessing your understanding.

Together, these updates are designed to remove unnecessary complexity from signing. Agreements are easier to understand, faster to review, and less stressful to complete—so you can sign with clarity and confidence.

These features are now available for all envelopes in English globally.

\**Source: OnePulse Survey of 1,000 Americans, December 2025*

Summary•4 min read

AI-Assisted Review in Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) speeds up agreement review and negotiation in line with your company’s legal and other requirements. Review agreements against your pre-approved playbooks and get redline suggestions to align language with your standards.

![AI-Assisted Review (December 2025)](https://images.ctfassets.net/9pvazpst9iwl/7Lfyuq2Z1FqiWNEbBAWKBr/03fad7aee6a38475ff7c7b5141294a8b/AI-Assisted-Review_25-11_Blog_Feature_Image_1200x900_EN__1_.png?fm=avif&q=90&w=500)

- - [Cut down on lengthy legal review processes](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-review#cut-down-on-lengthy-legal-review-processes)
  - [Speed up time to signature](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-review#speed-up-time-to-signature)
  - [Manage risk and compliance across teams](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-review#manage-risk-and-compliance-across-teams)
  - [Free your team to focus on more complex negotiations](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-review#free-your-team-to-focus-on-more-complex-negotiations)
  - [Accelerate your agreement creation processes today](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-review#accelerate-your-agreement-creation-processes-today)

Manual agreement review can be a lengthy, time-consuming process.

As organizations grow, so do the number of agreements requiring review, but the manual processes they often rely on rarely grow up with them. Ultimately, this can mean an unnecessary burden for team members whose time and attention may be better spent on more complex agreements and more strategic negotiations.

[Docusign AI-Assisted Review](https://www.docusign.com/products/ai-assisted-review) speeds up agreement review and empowers more of your business to review and negotiate without jeopardizing compliance with your legal and other organizational requirements.

title: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
heading_path: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
Cut down on lengthy legal review processes
text:
With Docusign AI-Assisted Review, users can easily accelerate agreement review and negotiation and empower more of the business to get involved, while ensuring agreements are reviewed according to the same standards and requirements. By adopting this feature, your legal team can save time to focus on higher-value, more strategic work.

Read on to find out how this powerful feature helps improve the speed, efficiency, and compliance of your organization’s agreement processes.

title: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
heading_path: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
Speed up time to signature
text:
Docusign AI-Assisted Review harnesses generative AI in a Microsoft Word add-in with the following capabilities:

- **Automate agreement review with AI.** Review agreement against your organization’s pre-approved playbooks with help from AI. Where language doesn’t align with your standards, get markup suggestions to bring terms back into compliance.
- **Generate new clauses and markup suggestions.** Describe in plain language the markups or new language you’d like to insert and let AI generate a starting point for you. No more having to start from scratch or find a good reference clause to build on.
- **Answer agreement-related questions.** Ask questions about the contents of your agreement and get quick answers thanks to AI, along with links to relevant source text to confirm answers for yourself.

title: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
heading_path: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
Manage risk and compliance across teams
text:
To keep pace with business, it’s essential that legal teams empower more of the organization to review and negotiate. Docusign AI-Assisted Review helps to ensure that every agreement is negotiated according to the same standards and positions, even as the number of team members involved in the process increases. Enjoy the benefits of:

- **Centralized playbooks.** Easily create review playbooks for all your organization’s agreement types and positions.  Ensure that team members involved in review and negotiation have the information they need to do so effectively.
- **Standardized review processes across growing teams.** Ensure that legal and non-legal teams across your organization—no matter how large—review agreements according to the same standards and negotiating positions.
- **Simple administration.** Create and update your playbooks and manage permissions yourself. Rules can be written in plain language, so maintaining playbooks and creating new ones is simple, making it easy to keep your playbooks up to date as your legal requirements change.

title: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
heading_path: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
Free your team to focus on more complex negotiations
text: When only a handful of team members are empowered to review and negotiate, they can easily become a bottleneck to quick agreement execution. For sales, procurement, and other teams, that can mean trouble—especially at the end of the quarter or during peak periods, when every moment counts. With Docusign AI-Assisted Review, legal teams can give teams beyond legal the tools and resources they need to review and negotiate effectively without sacrificing compliance with legal and business requirements. That means more time for legal to devote to higher risk, more complex agreements where their expertise is especially critical—and fewer bottlenecks for your business.

title: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
heading_path: Turn Agreements Around Faster with Docusign AI-Assisted Review
Accelerate your agreement creation processes today
text:
Docusign AI-Assisted Review accelerates agreement review and negotiation with generative AI inside Microsoft Word while empowering more of your business to review and negotiate in compliance with your legal team’s standards. The result? Faster deal cycles for sales, greater autonomy for procurement, and more—all without adding unnecessary risk.

This feature is available now to [Docusign CLM and CLM+](https://www.docusign.com/products/clm) customers globally, and in select Docusign IAM plans in the United States. [Contact our sales team](https://www.docusign.com/contact-sales) to learn more.

Summary•4 min read

Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) now includes an **AI contract review assistant**, helping organizations review agreements faster by analyzing contracts, answering questions, and suggesting edits directly within their workflow.

![Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) now includes an AI contract review assistant, helping organizations review agreements faster by analyzing contracts, answering questions, and suggesting edits directly within their workflow.](https://images.ctfassets.net/9pvazpst9iwl/IUJfbatPKpmEfE9H1SJ39/84fc0a9f934e51eda9615a6c873b287e/aiar-release-ai-chat-blog-1200x900-33e90ef.jpg?fm=avif&q=90&w=500)

Contracts are where business gets done, but reviewing them can slow everything down.

Negotiation is a critical step toward agreement. It is often the final hurdle between a potential opportunity and a fruitful partnership. This work is important, but it is also time-consuming. As organizations scale, the gap between the increasing number of agreements requiring review and the capacity of reviewers to tackle them often widens. Before long, tedious and error-prone manual review can become a bottleneck, resulting in everything from stunted revenue to strained relationships and more.

title: Turn Agreements Around Faster with an AI Contract Review Assistant
heading_path: Turn Agreements Around Faster with an AI Contract Review Assistant
Meet your AI-powered agreement assistant
text:
[Docusign AI-Assisted Review](https://www.docusign.com/products/ai-assisted-review) is an agreement assistant built to support faster, more efficient, and more confident review and negotiation—no matter your workflow or process.

Easily automate review against your playbooks with AI and get redline suggestions where terms deviate from your requirements. Don’t have a playbook? Iterate with conversational AI to answer questions, analyze terms, suggest edits, or draft new language from scratch—or easily generate a playbook from your standard template to jumpstart your review.

Powered by [Docusign Iris](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/ai), AI-Assisted Review empowers legal, procurement, and other teams to get agreements done in less time.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
text:
[Vlad PostelLead Product Manager, AI Platform](https://www.docusign.com/blog/author/vlad-postel)•Published Apr 24, 2025

---

Summary•9 min read

Docusign Iris, our AI engine, is built to understand agreements in multiple languages, helping customers get insights no matter where they do business—using hybrid AI models, secure infrastructure, and built-in governance to perform reliably across regions and languages.

![A graphic depicting that Docusign's AI platforms understand agreements in multiple languages, helping customers get insights no matter where they do business.](https://images.ctfassets.net/9pvazpst9iwl/2rQwIkPLRXYfqnyadKJZVG/361ed67caa9b5a58d1393cf174b6da63/Global_AI_v2.jpg?fm=avif&q=90&w=500)

- - [Empowering customers with multilingual AI models](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-globalization-at-docusign-empowering-customers-with-multilingual-ai#empowering-customers-with-multilingual-ai-models)
  - [Why it matters](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-globalization-at-docusign-empowering-customers-with-multilingual-ai#why-it-matters)
  - [Global, enterprise infrastructure at scale](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-globalization-at-docusign-empowering-customers-with-multilingual-ai#global-enterprise-infrastructure-at-scale)
  - [Building multilingual AI models](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-globalization-at-docusign-empowering-customers-with-multilingual-ai#building-multilingual-ai-models)

  - [Building trust through AI governance](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-globalization-at-docusign-empowering-customers-with-multilingual-ai#building-trust-through-ai-governance)

**Key takeaways:**

- **Navigator multilingual insights** – Docusign [Navigator](https://www.docusign.com/blog/digitize-and-organize-your-agreements-central-repository) delivers AI-powered agreement insights in English, French, and German—with [expanded insights](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=enus) added in April and support for Brazilian Portuguese, Spanish, and Japanese planned later this year.
- **AI-Assisted Review** – Docusign [AI-Assisted Review](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-review) will be available in French and German in May, with plans to expand to Brazilian Portuguese and Spanish later this year.
- **Hybrid AI approach** – Combines third-party large language models with proprietary multilingual AI to extract agreement insights at scale.
- **Global enterprise infrastructure at scale** – Docusign Iris operates on a secure, globally distributed infrastructure, ensuring low-latency performance at scale to support agreement management worldwide.
- **AI governance at the heart** – Trust and transparency drive our AI globalization efforts, with in-product controls giving customers full oversight of data use for AI training.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Empowering customers with multilingual AI models
text:
Docusign serves organizations around the world in over 180 markets, which is why we’ve adopted a global-first mindset for AI development—designing our models from the outset to bring AI-powered agreement insights to customers in multiple languages. In December 2024, we reached a major milestone by launching AI globalization support, expanding our Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform to provide agreement specific multilingual AI capabilities at scale.

As a flagship example, [Navigator](https://www.docusign.com/blog/digitize-and-organize-your-agreements-central-repository) is the first step in applying this AI-powered approach. It now enables customers to extract agreement insights in English, French, and German, with support for Brazilian Portuguese, Spanish, and Japanese planned for later this year. In April 2025, we added additional insights in English (Global), French, and German to build on the initial December release. See the [Language and Regional Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pqz1702943441912&topicId=xvp1729795957126.html&_LANG=esxm) topic for the complete list of available insights per language and more details on language availability and regional expansion. All of this is made possible with [Docusign Iris –](https://www.docusign.com/blog/docusign-iris-agreement-ai) the AI engine that powers AI capabilities across the agreement lifecycle, enabling you to create agreements faster, commit with greater confidence, and manage for maximum business impact.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Why it matters
text:
AI globalization is pivotal for enhancing the user experience, ensuring our AI tools are accessible to all and perform consistently across languages and regions. For customers, this means agreements can be processed, reviewed, and analyzed —not just translated but deeply understood—in their native languages, reducing manual effort and boosting productivity. Expanding AI capabilities to diverse languages allows businesses to rely on Docusign Iris for consistent agreement management across global markets.

Let’s explore our approach, foundational building blocks, and key technologies driving Docusign’s AI globalization efforts.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Global, enterprise infrastructure at scale
text:
A key differentiator for Docusign is our robust and globally distributed infrastructure, designed to operate at scale for large enterprises. With AI services deployed across North America (NA), Europe (EU), Canada (CA), Australia (AU), and soon in Japan (JP), we provide low-latency performance and data residency in regions where our customers do business. This infrastructure allows us to seamlessly handle high volumes of agreements in multiple languages, a feat that many providers often struggle to achieve.

**Key benefits for customers:**

- **Scalable infrastructure** – Whether processing 100 or 100,000 agreements, Docusign Iris is built to scale to meet business demands. Multilingual AI models are deployed globally, ensuring resilience and availability, with pipelines that adapt to growing operational needs.
- **Data residency** – Agreements and extracted data can be stored within region-specific data centers, to provide customers with peace of mind and safeguards to customer data.
- **Consistency across regions** – Enterprise customers benefit from uniform, enterprise-grade performance across all regions, ensuring smooth operations.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Building multilingual AI models
text: We adopt a hybrid AI model approach to enable accurate and scalable AI across multiple languages. This involves leveraging third-party large language models like Azure Open AI alongside in-house models specifically designed for contract processing and agreement intelligence.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Building multilingual AI models
Data acquisition and selection
text:
Sourcing high-quality, diverse datasets is fundamental to agreement AI globalization. Real-world contracts and agreements vary significantly across languages and countries, making it challenging to build a globally representative dataset for each use case. Our approach focuses on ensuring data quality and relevance through the following methods:

- **Vendor partnerships** – Partnering with trusted data vendors to source multilingual contracts, expanding the breadth and depth of our datasets.
- **Anonymized, aggregated customer data** – By utilizing anonymized and aggregated customer data from customers who have consented, Docusign enhances the accuracy and performance of AI-assisted offerings.

  - This includes anonymization techniques such as redaction, masking, and replacement with non-sensitive alternatives, and aggregation methods that combine and merge data into a unified set to desensitize source data.
  - It is important to note that customers retain full control over their data and can disable data sharing for AI training at any time. Learn more about this in [Docusign’s AI-Powered Future, With Customer Control at Its Core](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-powered-future-customer-control).
- **High quality data** – We methodically select a representative set of agreements reflecting diverse legal structures and languages. Duplicates, templates, and irrelevant content are removed to ensure high-quality inputs for model training.

By leveraging this diversified data acquisition pipeline, we improve AI development across languages, reduce biases, and enhance model performance.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Building multilingual AI models
Annotation
text:
Labeling multilingual datasets at scale is complex, requiring precision to ensure AI models perform consistently across languages. The quality of AI models is only as good as the data on which they are trained*.* To address this, we are enhancing automation and reinforcing quality control through the following initiatives:

- **Annotation automation** – We are investing in smart labeling tools that automate data annotation by combining machine learning with human oversight, accelerating the process while maintaining accuracy.
- **Parallel annotation** – Datasets are annotated simultaneously across multiple languages to ensure consistency in labeling, reducing variability and aligning data quality across regions.
- **Quality control and validation loops** – Our locale-specific subject matter experts validate substantial amounts of annotated data, applying their expertise iteratively to refine labels until the desired precision is consistently achieved.

By combining automation with human expertise, we build high-quality datasets that power reliable multilingual AI models.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Building multilingual AI models
Model development
text:
By leveraging a combination of AI techniques, we refine our models to deliver consistent, high-quality agreement insights at scale.

**Key components of our approach:**

- **Snippet Selection** - We employ AI-driven snippet selection using Docusign AI models to extract the most relevant sections from lengthy contracts, reducing noise and improving accuracy. This reduction in document size accelerates contract analysis—giving customers faster, more reliable insights.
- **Prompt Engineering** - We use prompt engineering with large language models to enhance multilingual data extraction. Prompts are designed to account for language-specific legal nuances and are iteratively refined based on feedback and observed performance.
- **Post-Processing and Normalization** - Extracted data undergoes post-processing to improve accuracy and consistency across languages. This includes error correction, filtering of irrelevant results, and normalization to maintain standardized outputs.
- **Fine-tuning Models** - Our strategy includes fine-tuning AI models to improve accuracy and scalability over time. Through iterative model improvements, we enhance our ability to process agreements efficiently across multiple languages.

title: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
heading_path: AI Globalization at Docusign: Empowering Customers with Multilingual AI Models
Building trust through AI governance
text:
AI governance is at the heart of our globalization strategy. From the earliest stages of model development, we prioritize building trust by embedding robust governance practices into our AI systems. Key areas of focus include:

- **Data protection & security** - When you use Docusign Iris, your data is encrypted both in transit and at rest preventing unauthorized users from accessing customer data. If you consent to sharing data for AI/ML training, it is aggregated and anonymized before use. When anonymized data is used to customize AI models, those models are only available for Docusign to use.
- **Transparency** - Your anonymized data is only used for AI/ML training with your consent, and you have the flexibility to manage your consent. Make informed decisions confidently with clear documentation available at your fingertips.
- **Accuracy & fairness** - Docusign Iris is built to minimize errors and harmful outputs, vital in high-stakes scenarios like renewals or negotiations. We use diverse datasets and thorough checks to correct skewed outputs and ensure quality before model deployment. You also have the final say to approve outputs, so they always meet your standards.
- **Extensibility & adaptability** - Our compliant storage and compute platform for data labeling and AI training is designed to be extensible. Built to address GDPR requirements and adoption of other frameworks, including the NIST AI standards, to maintain alignment with evolving regulations.

By embedding governance into every step of our AI development, we build secure, compliant, and scalable solutions that help meet the needs of our global customer base.

As we continue expanding our multilingual AI capabilities, we remain committed to enabling seamless, compliant, and intelligent agreement management for businesses across the globe. Learn more about how [Docusign Iris](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/ai), our [AI Trust capabilities](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/ai/ai-trust), [6 AI Innovation Principles](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/ai/innovation-principles), and [Docusign IAM platform](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform) work together to deliver secure, and innovative solutions to customers worldwide.

Vlad PostelLead Product Manager, AI Platform

Summary•6 min read

Docusign Iris is the AI engine that powers Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) and our AI features across the agreement lifecycle.

![UI Preview of Docusign Iris](https://images.ctfassets.net/9pvazpst9iwl/1EgmpeABbw7IF7IpSAjoyj/0067f4cd404d930bbe56cc7f9233bf64/ds-ui-iris-blog-1200x900-33e90ef.jpg?fm=avif&q=90&w=500)

- - [Introducing agreement intelligence with Docusign Iris](https://www.docusign.com/blog/docusign-iris-agreement-ai#introducing-agreement-intelligence-with-docusign-iris)
  - [How Docusign Iris works](https://www.docusign.com/blog/docusign-iris-agreement-ai#how-docusign-iris-works)
  - [More agreement AI capabilities coming soon](https://www.docusign.com/blog/docusign-iris-agreement-ai#more-agreement-ai-capabilities-coming-soon)
  - [Transforming agreement management with Docusign Iris](https://www.docusign.com/blog/docusign-iris-agreement-ai#transforming-agreement-management-with-docusign-iris)
  - [Docusign Iris: Agreement AI you can trust](https://www.docusign.com/blog/docusign-iris-agreement-ai#docusign-iris-agreement-ai-you-can-trust)

Companies across nearly every industry have been fast-tracking the implementation of AI into their business. And while the AI takeover has had profound benefits, it’s important to remember that not all AI is created equal. Some AI models are built for general use on a wide variety of tasks, and some are purpose-built for the challenges of specific businesses and workflows.

Over the past year we launched Docusign [Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM)](https://www.docusign.com/intelligent-agreement-management), a platform that connects and automates every step of the agreement processes. From AI-assisted contract review to our intelligent repository Docusign Agreement Manager, we’ve been building features that help our customers work smarter and discover the hidden value of their agreements.

But what exactly is the agreement AI that puts the “I” in IAM?

Meet [Docusign Iris](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/ai), the AI engine that powers Docusign IAM and our AI features across the agreement lifecycle. Tailor-made for your agreements and built on the back of over 20 years of agreement expertise, Iris combines our unmatched expertise, agreement-centric data, and powerful AI models to deliver actionable insights and automation that drive agreements - and businesses - forward.

title: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
heading_path: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
Introducing agreement intelligence with Docusign Iris
text:
Docusign Iris has an expert-level understanding of complex agreement workflows and language, giving it the ability to provide you with comprehensive insights.

Here’s a closer look at how Iris stands out from other AI platforms:

- **Exclusive agreement datasets:** With diverse, specialized agreement data sets and deep agreement expertise, we’ve equipped Iris to deliver accurate and relevant agreement insights seamlessly within the Docusign user experience.
- **Data that stays in your control:** Iris, just like Docusign, is built with trust at the forefront to deliver next-generation AI solutions. Our consent-based approach to [AI data sets](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-powered-future-customer-control) gives you control over whether your data is utilized for AI training, and we prioritize protecting your information by aggregating and anonymizing data used for training purposes.
- **Enterprise-grade and tested**: Docusign IAM, powered by Iris, scales with your organization, supporting AI customization, seamless integrations, and global localization. With a flexible model infrastructure, you always benefit from the latest LLMs—tailored specifically for agreements—to drive real-world impact.

title: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
heading_path: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
How Docusign Iris works
text:
Iris is already making significant strides in transforming agreement management for organizations of all sizes. Here are some examples of how Iris enhances your experience from sale to signature:

- [**AI-assisted review:**](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-assisted-review) Iris helps streamline contract review and negotiation processes, including reviewing agreements against pre-defined legal standards and suggesting AI-generated markups and clause language. This helps ensure that contracts are thoroughly analyzed for compliance and accuracy with your internal playbooks, reducing the time and manual effort previously required.
- [**Renewal management**](https://www.docusign.com/blog/how-to-simplify-contract-renewals)**:** Iris simplifies renewal tracking with automated notifications and pre-built reports—delivering actionable insights to ensure timely and efficient contract renewals. Now your business can easily prevent unwanted auto-renewals and use the data to identify cost-saving opportunities.
- [**AI-assisted data extractions**](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/navigator)**:** With Iris, you can automatically identify and record critical data buried in your agreements. This standardizes your unstructured data which makes agreements more discoverable and reportable. With this data identified, you can boost efficiency for your most valuable teams and leverage newly identified data to make more strategic decisions

text: [AI contract agents](https://www.docusign.com/blog/ai-contract-agents-future-agreement-management)enable you to automate repetitive and low-risk tasks like prioritizing contract requests and offer smart recommendations for contract actions like renegotiation.

title: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
heading_path: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
More agreement AI capabilities coming soon
New AI capabilities in Docusign Agreement Manager
text:
[Docusign Agreement Manager](https://www.docusign.com/blog/navigator-smart-manage-agreements), our centralized agreement repository, has gotten smarter over the past year, thanks to the latest AI advancements from Iris. Now you can easily [capture custom agreement data](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/navigator) at scale, with just a few example contracts. No more tedious work to manually identify and record specific contract metadata, Iris can do the work for you with just a few clicks.

Another complex task you can now automate with Iris is tracking contractual obligations. New [obligation management capabilities](https://www.docusign.com/blog/obligation-management-docusign-iam) in Agreement Manager allow you to track key renewal, payment, and termination terms automatically, receive automated reminders, report on scheduled obligations, and manually capture obligations that are unique. Now you reduce the time spent tracking this information manually and say goodbye to missed obligations.

Transforming agreement management with Docusign Iris
Boost revenue, cut costs with insights
text: Iris powers Docusign dashboards and AI-assisted data extractions that offer deep insights into your agreements. By analyzing patterns and trends within your contracts, Iris can help you identify key opportunities for growth. For example, it can help sales reps zero in on high-value accounts and start renewal conversations early—giving them more time to personalize outreach and boost retention.

title: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
heading_path: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
Transforming agreement management with Docusign Iris
Close agreements in record time
text:
AI-powered solutions streamline the preparation and negotiation phases by automating repetitive tasks like tagging fields and enforcing company standards. [According to Deloitte research](https://www.docusign.com/deloitte-agreement-study), organizations with more advanced Agreement Storage and Categorization, such as AI-enabled contract categorization, saw an average of 40% fewer deal delays.

Iris empowers users to self-serve contract-related questions through a generative Q&A experience and uses AI-driven automation to route agreements to the appropriate approvers—helping to prevent bottlenecks and keep workflows moving efficiently.

title: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
heading_path: Meet Docusign Iris: The AI Behind Intelligent Agreement Management
Transforming agreement management with Docusign Iris
Minimize legal and financial risk
text:
Iris helps decode legal jargon and complex contract language, so you can avoid costly mistakes. Iris uses AI to analyze agreements, flag risky clauses, and recommend compliant language—helping your team stay aligned with playbooks. In fact, procurement teams with more advanced Review and Risk Evaluation capabilities are [69% more likely](https://www.docusign.com/deloitte-agreement-study) to report outperforming their goals than their peers with less mature systems.

Iris also helps you stay ahead of risk by surfacing key contractual commitments and potential anomalies for review.

Our powerful, purpose-built AI will help you boost revenue, improve efficiency, minimize risk, and safeguard your data every step of the way. And we’re already working on more features to ensure you’re always getting the most out of your agreements.

Stay tuned for more from Docusign Iris, and find a further [breakdown of the full power of Docusign Iris here](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/ai).

title: A Smarter Docusign eSignature Experience, Powered by AI
heading_path: A Smarter Docusign eSignature Experience, Powered by AI
text:
Published Jan 13, 2026

---

Summary•3 min read

A reimagined Docusign eSignature experience, powered by AI, offers a faster, more intuitive way to prepare and send agreements by eliminating the friction of manual processes and boosting signer and sender confidence.

![A Smarter Docusign eSignature Experience, Powered by AI](https://images.ctfassets.net/9pvazpst9iwl/5rvGRu0l5m7oOvx9KgWIth/5a6df4bb917f3fc0bae55e88ae7d3a36/ds-ui-tagger-blog_1200x900.png?fm=avif&q=90&w=500)

- - [Get started](https://www.docusign.com/blog/smarter-esignature-experience-powered-by-ai#get-started)

Businesses run on agreements, but too often, the journey to a completed signature is a frustrating obstacle course.

For the people preparing agreements, the work is often slow and manual: finding and placing fields one by one, deciding what information belongs where, and double-checking details before hitting send. Every extra step can introduce friction, delays, and opportunities for error.

On the other side, signers are left to navigate dense legal language with little context. When something isn’t clear, progress stalls. Confusion leads to hesitation, and hesitation can lead to abandoned agreements.

All of this friction adds up. Deals take longer to close. Conversion rates suffer. Agreements shouldn’t slow business down, they should move it forward.

We’re introducing new features to Docusign eSignature to help remove the friction that slows down agreements. With AI-assisted features, we’re automating tedious document preparation, while a new signing experience provides more clarity and confidence.

- **Get agreements out faster:** Use AI-powered features to automate tedious work, while a modernized experience helps you send agreements with ease.
- **Drive conversion**: Give your signers the confidence they need to complete agreements quickly. Our new AI-powered features provide more clarity, leading to faster completion and a higher conversion rate.
- **Deliver with confidence**: Ensure your agreements reach the right people . We help you eliminate delivery risks by verifying recipient information.

Validate recipient contact details in real time
text: Pre-send Data Verification ensures your agreements reach the right people  by integrating with 3rd party databases to validate the accuracy and reachability of recipient email addresses and phone numbers before an envelope is sent. *Available March 2026.*

Allow signers to get agreement-specific questions answered in real-time with the help of AI, so they can sign with confidence. *Available now.*

text:
This is an example of rules for an NDA playbook. The example is provided for information
purposes only, and is not a substitute for legal advice.

- The purpose of the NDA needs to be limited to exploring a potential business
  opportunity.
- Confidential Information will not include any information that: (i) is or
  becomes publicly known without breach of this Agreement; (ii) is already in the
  possession of, or lawfully known by, the receiving party at the time of
  disclosure by the disclosing party; (iii) is received from another source who
  can disclose it lawfully and without an obligation to keep it confidential; or
  (iv) is independently developed by the receiving party without use of, or
  reference to, the disclosing party’s Confidential Information.
- Confidential information should be limited to non-public information.
- Each party will only use or disclose the other party’s Confidential Information
  as expressly allowed under this Agreement and for purposes of the business
  relationship between the parties.
- Each party will not disclose the other party’s Confidential Information to third
  parties without the other party’s prior written consent.
- Each party will take reasonable measures to protect the other party’s
  Confidential Information. Such measures must be at least as protective as those
  taken to protect its own Confidential Information.
- A party will notify the other party promptly upon discovery of any unauthorized
  disclosure or access to or use of the other party’s Confidential Information and
  will cooperate with the other party to help regain control of the Confidential
  Information and prevent further unauthorized disclosure or use of it.
- Each party may share Confidential Information with its representatives if they
  are also under a NDA and if the recipient is responsible for the
  representative’s use of this confidential information.
- A party may disclose the other party’s Confidential Information if required by
  applicable law or to comply with a court order or other governmental demand that
  has the force of law if, to the extent permitted by applicable law, the
  receiving party promptly notifies the disclosing party of that obligation prior
  to production so the disclosing party may seek a protective order or other
  remedy.
- Nothing in this Agreement will obligate either party to proceed with any
  transaction between them, and each party reserves the right, in its sole
  discretion, to terminate the discussions contemplated by this Agreement.
- All confidential information is provided "as is" and with all faults. Neither
  party makes any warranties, express, implied or otherwise regarding the
  accuracy, completeness, or performance of its confidential information.
- The disclosing party will not be liable for any loss, harm, or other damages
  arising out of the use of, or reliance on, any Confidential Information.
- Upon the disclosing party’s request, the receiving party will promptly return or
  destroy the disclosing party’s Confidential Information, without retaining any
  copies, except that (a) copies may be retained for record retention purposes
  only, and (b) neither party is required to destroy electronic copies of
  materials or summaries containing or reflecting Confidential Information that
  are automatically generated through data backup or archiving systems that are
  not readily accessible.
- If Confidential Information is retained for records retention purposes or
  through standard electronic back up purposes, such Confidential Information
  shall remain covered by the protections provided herein for the duration of its
  retention unless it becomes exempt.
- All confidential information remains the property of the disclosing party.
- The NDA may be terminated for convenience at any time.
- A party’s confidentiality obligations last for 3 years following the date the
  receiving party receives the confidential information unless it’s otherwise
  explicitly protected under this agreement.
- Parties relationship must be stated as independent contractors.
- In the event of a breach of this agreement, a party may seek specific
  performance (including injunctive relief) in any court of competent
  jurisdiction.
- The agreement must be governed by Delaware law, without reference to conflict of
  laws principles.
- This agreement may not be assigned without the other party’s consent.

title: Support for AI-Assisted Review in Agreement Desk ​Plans
heading_path: Support for AI-Assisted Review in Agreement Desk ​Plans
text:
Learn about the features and permissions that are available through Agreement Desk plans for AI-Assisted Review.

Agreement Desk is available in three Docusign IAM plans:

- IAM Professional
- IAM for Enterprise
- IAM for Sales

The plan you have determines the level of functionality available to you in AI-Assisted Review. The full set of AI-assisted review capabilities is available with Agreement Desk in the Enterprise and Sales plans.

With IAM Professional plans, AI-Assisted Review includes a simple save experience to make edits in Microsoft Word, and save them back to a request.

Access to AI-Assisted Review functionality is determined by a user’s playbook permissions. ​Playbook permissions are included with Agreement Desk Enterprise and Sales plans only. By default, Global Request Managers and Admins have View and Manage playbook permissions, respectively. Request editors can be granted View or Manage playbook permissions by a Global Request Manager or Admin. Users with permissions to View or Manage playbooks will also have the ability to use the Chat capabilities in AI-Assisted Review.

title: Install the AI-Assisted Review Add-In for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Install the AI-Assisted Review Add-In for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to install the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.

Installing the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk enables contract clause corrections, suggestions, and markup. Once a contract has been analyzed, the add-in can be used to add and generate terms, and answer contract-related questions. Suggestions can be inserted in place within the contract and saved for sharing with stakeholders.

Individual users should install AI-Assisted Review from Microsoft Marketplace. Navigate to the page for the [Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Microsoft Word on Microsoft Marketplace](https://appsource.microsoft.com/en-us/product/office/WA200007813), and select Get it now to install the add-in. You will be prompted to sign in to Microsoft to complete the installation.

Alternatively, administrators can install the add-in for their organization through the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. Deploying the add-in through the Admin Center will make it available to selected users and groups. For more information on installing the add-in through the Microsoft 365 Admin Center, see [Deploy your Office Add-ins](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/manage/office-addins?view=o365-worldwide#deploy-your-office-add-ins). Even when deploying centrally, administrators will reference the store listing.

Once installed, see Review Contracts Using the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk for instructions on how to use the add-in to review contracts.

Note: Mobile, web, and tablet versions of Microsoft Word are not supported for this add-in. For managed installations of the add-in, a license of Office that includes Exchange and Office 365 for Desktop is required. The Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk supports the following versions of Microsoft Office and Microsoft Word;

- Office on Windows (build 16.0.16130+, connected to an active Microsoft 365 subscription)
- Office 2021 or later on Windows (or versions greater than 2019 on a retail license after installing the correct WebView)
- Office on Mac (build 16.70+, connected to an active Microsoft 365 subscription)
- Office 2019 or later on Mac

title: Contract Review With the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Contract Review With the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Read about the features available in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.

The Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk is a powerful tool for contract review and analysis. AI-Assisted Review hosts a range of features that simplifies contract review for your business.

AI-Assisted Review can be used to review agreements with conversational Al, answer contract-related questions, analyze terms, suggest edits, and draft new language in a single interface. Custom playbooks can be created for any agreement type or position to enable situation-specific contract review.

Note:

- AI-Assisted Review is available on IAM for Enterprise and IAM for Sales plans. For more details on availability and features for your Docusign IAM plan, see [Support for AI-Assisted Review in Agreement Desk Plans](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=con74e34c35-eb00-48d8-a66b-5723cf2a8273.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the features and permissions that are available through Agreement Desk plans for AI-Assisted Review.").
- Only certain types of user permission profiles have the ability to view, create, run, and edit playbooks. For more information about user permission profiles for playbooks, see Set Playbook Permissions for the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.
- If issues are encountered while using AI-Assisted Review, reload the add-in to see if it solves the issue. For all issues with AI-Assisted Review, [contact Docusign Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/contactSupport?language=en_US).
- AI-Assisted Review can only be used with DOCX files. Macros and content control are not supported in AI-Assisted Review, and may cause errors.

title: Best Practices for Playbook Rule Writing in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Best Practices for Playbook Rule Writing in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn about best practices and guidance for writing playbook rules in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.

There are several ways to start creating your playbook for AI-Assisted Review. If you don’t have a playbook, you can begin building one by following these suggestions:

1. List the top 5-10 items you often or always review in your most common legal reviews.
2. Review each section, noting rules where you know requirements exist.
3. Look at a recently reviewed document and see what edits you made. If these happen at least occasionally, they are good candidates for a playbook rule.

Users with the proper permissions can also use AI-Assisted Review to generate a playbook from an uploaded document. For more information on generating playbooks using AI, see [Generate Playbooks Using the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=tsk76dfc02e-b1f2-4ebe-8a05-0efbfa622c0b.html&_LANG=enus).

Note: AI-Assisted Review currently supports AI-powered review of agreements in English, French, German, Spanish, and Brazilian Portuguese. The add-in will automatically detect the most commonly occurring language in a document, and return suggested edits in that language. We recommend that your document, playbook, and Chat input language match, to ensure consistent results. For example, users should review French language agreements using French language playbooks, and French language Chat input.

title: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Read about tips and best practices for writing playbook rules for the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.

When writing playbook rules, you are providing instructions for how and when to suggest
changes to your contract. You can use plain language, but you should aim to be
specific. The more specific you are in the rules, the more information you are
giving for recommendations.

It is recommended to write playbook rules as if you were giving instructions to someone
unfamiliar with your business. The add-in will only know what you tell it, so
context helps. When writing rules, you can refine the playbook rule automatically by selecting Refine with AI which will suggest improvements to your rule based on these best practices for more specific, consistent results.

Here are some best practices and examples to follow for writing clear and specific rules.

title: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
1. Focus on one concept at a time
text:
If there is a rule with multiple instructions, you should separate them into multiple rules. This often results in better suggestions and allows you to build in more details for each rule separately.

Example:

- Instead of: “The contract term should last at least 2 years and governing law is Delaware”, try:
  - Rule 1: The contract term should last at least 2 years.
  - Rule 2: The governing law must be Delaware.

title: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
2. Be specific about your recommendations
text:
Write your instructions as “if, then” statements about how the contract should be edited. This adds clarity and will provide better instructions. You can also use “greater than”, “less than”, “equal to” for any numerical value.

Examples:

- Instead of “No 3 year terms”, try: “If the term length is 3 years or longer,
  change it to 2 years.”

  Note: In this example, the original rule is ambiguous; it doesn't clarify whether the desired edit is to change an existing 3-year term to a shorter or longer term, or to remove the specified term length entirely. The suggested improvement gives specific instructions about how to edit the contract.
- To remove language entirely, use “delete”, “remove” or similar indications.
  - "Remove any clause about export laws."
  - "Jurisdiction should be Seattle, Washington. If there is some other state listed, delete it entirely."
- You can also use “more,” “less than,” or “equal to” relative to dates and numerical values.
  - “Payments are due no less than 45 days from the invoice receipt
    date”
  - “Termination notices should be more than 10 days”

title: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
3. Use quotation marks for matching exact text
text:
If you want specific terms mentioned word-for-word in the contract, include the exact
language in your rule.

Examples:

- A data breach or security incident must include “accidental or unlawful loss, alteration, misuse, unauthorized access, or destruction of our data, including all personal data and all data processed by Vendor or its subprocessors”.
- Publicity clause must state “The Company may not use or display Customer’s logo, trademark, trade name, and other mark in or on its website, customer list, or any of its marketing materials.”

title: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Rule Writing Tips for Playbooks in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
4. Give context to match specific sections
text:
If your requirement only pertains to a particular clause or section, include section information in the rule. This helps to reduce ambiguity, and ensures an edit targets a particular section of the document.

Examples:

- The definition of confidential information should include product roadmaps.
- The term length information must specify termination for convenience is
  permitted at any time without consent.

  Note: It is not recommended to use section numbers (e.g., “Section 11.4”) to match a given section. A title or description of the section's contents is most helpful here, as outlined in the examples.

title: Playbook Rule Optimization in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Playbook Rule Optimization in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn about how to format legal review questions into playbook rules in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.

Sometimes, playbook rules are formatted differently for your team from how they would be
written as instructions for AI-Assisted Review. Here are some examples of common
changes to optimize your playbook rules.

| Before | After | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Is this NDA mutual or one-way? | NDA must be mutual. | Rules should be stated as instructions, not questions. Convert questions to statements and think about what case you want flagged for review to make your assertion. |
| Governing law must be Washington, Delaware, or Georgia. | Governing law must be Washington, Delaware, or Georgia. If none of these is listed, change the governing law to Delaware. | You should aim to cover the main cases that arise in your instructions. Otherwise, if “Utah” appears, the add-in doesn’t know which of your 3 allowable states you prefer to be listed. |
| Flag any term length longer than 3 years. | The term length must be less than 3 years. | The add-in isn’t programmed to flag, highlight, or perform other operations outside of providing you a valuable suggestion. Focus on the requirement itself in your rule and the flagging part will be handled. |
| No non-standard payment terms. | Payment terms must be NET 45 or fewer. | You need to clarify what you consider non-standard so the add-in can identify non-standard terms. |
| If the counterparty changes the term length to be less than one year, reject this change. | Term length must be 1 year or greater. | The add-in runs over the current state of the document and doesn’t see which party markup came from. The rule should be written to reflect the requirement itself, assuming the counterparty edit is applied. |

If you are not getting the results you want from rules you have made, here are some
tips for tuning your rules for better results.

| Case | Recommendation |
| --- | --- |
| Rule doesn’t match the correct section. | Sometimes this happens if there are very similar sections in a contract. Add more context in your description to help the add-in find the correct section. This could be alluding to the section name, the objective of the section, or any other details about your requirement. |
| Rule doesn’t give me an adequate suggestion. | Be specific about what you want to be stipulated in the add-in output. Think about additions to the rule that you would explain to someone who knows nothing about your business. You should guide the add-in to the outcomes you expect by being as specific as needed. |
| Rule doesn’t match all of the sections I expect in my document. | Provide more details in your rule to ensure the AI can identify all relevant sections. |

title: Preview an Agreement Using the Docusign AI-Assisted Review Add-In for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Preview an Agreement Using the Docusign AI-Assisted Review Add-In for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to use AI-Assisted Review features while previewing a document in Agreement Desk.

When previewing a document in Agreement Desk, you can use AI-Assisted Review’s tools to answer questions, analyze terms, and suggest edits from within the Agreement Desk request. If further changes are needed, the selected agreement can be opened in Microsoft Word for edits.

1. In Agreement Desk, select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
2. Select a request to open it.
3. Select the Documents tab.
4. Open a document from the Overview tab, or choose a document and select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MjgsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.R7X4rwH9vRfQr8B4Nw-SIa5F0t0OZPQEjLLGgZh30Ac&_LANG=enus "Options")menu, and choose Preview.

   Agreement Desk displays a preview of the selected document, along with AI-Assisted Review. You can access AI-Assisted Review's features for chat- and playbook-based functionality.
5. (Optional) To make further changes or to apply suggestions from chat or playbooks, select Edit in Word. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log in to the AI-Assisted Review add-in.

title: Create a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Create a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to create a playbook in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. Playbooks are collections of rules that enable the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk to review and markup agreements.

Playbooks can be created to manage rules, suggest changes, and insert preferred language in AI-Assisted Review. Playbooks accelerate contract review and negotiation, empowering teams to manage lightweight review and negotiation without jeopardizing legal compliance.

Note:

- AI-Assisted Review currently supports AI-powered review of agreements in English, French, German, Spanish, and Brazilian Portuguese. The add-in will automatically detect the most commonly occurring language in a document, and return suggested edits in that language. We recommend that your document, playbook, and Chat input language match, to ensure consistent results. For example, users should review French language agreements using French language playbooks, and French language Chat input.
- AI-Assisted Review's user interface is available in all 14 languages supported in Docusign. Users can update their language settings in Docusign. For more information on user language preference, see [Update Your Regional Settings in My Profile](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=jux1643235969954&topicId=xlc1717521107193.html&_LANG=enus)﻿. Docusign Administrators can set which languages are enabled for users. For more information on language settings in Docusign, see [Time Zone, Date Format, and Language](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=&pik1583277475390&topicId=wyk1583277329566.html&_LANG=enus).
- Only certain types of user permission profiles have the ability to create or edit playbooks. For more information about user permission profiles for playbooks, see [Set Playbook Permissions for the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=tsk8b028ec5-3d65-45a6-aec6-6b3540565b75.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the permissions that are required for users and groups to use playbooks and Chat in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. User and group permissions determine playbook and Chat access in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.").

Agreement Desk users with the required permissions can access AI-Assisted Review for playbook creation in several ways.

1. From Agreement Desk:
   1. Select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
   2. Select a request to open it.
   3. Select the Documents tab.
   4. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NDEsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.BVtWIZVnP-aEmSD5Q3qaV0LmNT_pXU4kBWNBbqtz-aM&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose Edit in Word. Or, open the document preview, and select Edit in Word.
   5. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
2. From a document located on your local storage:
   1. Locate the document on your local storage.
   2. Open the document.

      The document opens in Microsoft Word.
   3. Select the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in from the Home ribbon in Microsoft Word. If prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
3. After opening the agreement using one of these methods, follow these steps to create a playbook using AI-Assisted Review:
   1. Select AI-Assisted Review.

      The AI-Assisted Review window displays, and the document is ready for review by the add-in.
   2. Select Playbooks.

      AI-Assisted Review displays all available playbooks.
   3. Select New Playbook or Generate Playbook.

title: Create a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Create a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:

   2. Select Playbooks.

      AI-Assisted Review displays all available playbooks.
   3. Select New Playbook or Generate Playbook.

      The New Playbook or Generate Playbook screen displays.
   4. To create a new playbook:

      - Enter a title and description for your new playbook.
      - Select Add Rule to add a rule to your new playbook.
      - Enter your rule for the new playbook.

      To generate a new playbook from an uploaded document:

      - Select Upload File to upload a DOCX or PDF document to act as a playbook template.
      - Choose a document from your local storage and select Upload.
      - Select Generate Playbook.

      Note:
      - Playbook rules should use plain language that describes how AI-Assisted Review should analyze your agreements. For more guidance on writing playbook rules, see [Best Practices for Playbook Rule Writing in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=fje1726766463553-fwcby1ke.html&_LANG=enus).
      - To refine your new playbook rule automatically, select Refine with AI. Selecting Refine with AI will suggest improvements to your rule based on these best practices for more specific, consistent results.
   5. (Optional) Select the Optional settings dropdown to add a Rule title, Internal notes, or Custom comment to your playbook rule.
   6. Select Test Rule to test your playbook rule on the contract.

      AI-Assisted Review displays the results of the rule, including reason and suggestions for markup. Contract sections that do not pass the playbook rule are shown with strikethroughs, and suggested replacement terms are bolded. If there are multiple sections in the agreement where AI-Assisted Review finds results, they will be displayed under the associated rule.
   7. Once all options and adjustments have been made, select Save.

      AI-Assisted Review returns you to your new playbook.
   8. To add more rules, select Add Rule, and follow Steps D through G.
   9. Once all rules have been submitted and tested, select Save.

You have successfully created a new playbook for AI-Assisted Review. You can select this playbook and run it against your contracts.

title: Chat in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Chat in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to use chat in AI-Assisted Review to review and answer questions on contracts, analyze terms, suggest edits, and draft new language.

The chat experience in Docusign AI-Assisted Review enables users to quickly understand agreements and their terms, generate markup, modify clauses, and add language to a contract. Users can enter prompts and questions into chat to get answers, analyze terms, suggest edits, and draft new contract language. Responses can be copied from the add-in, and distributed to stakeholders as needed.

Note: AI-Assisted Review currently supports AI-powered review of agreements in English, French, German, Spanish, and Brazilian Portuguese. The add-in will automatically detect the most commonly occurring language in a document, and return suggested edits in that language. We recommend that your document, playbook, and Chat input language match, to ensure consistent results. For example, users should review French language agreements using French language playbooks, and French language Chat input.

Agreement Desk users with the required permissions can access AI-Assisted Review’s Chat in several ways.

1. From Agreement Desk:
   1. Select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
   2. Select a request to open it.
   3. Select the Documents tab.
   4. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5ODAsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.PN73N3WZ_O_glMMOkPt0QCkiNVpv-IEeqYjPBZuSy9A&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose Edit in Word. Or, open the document preview, and select Edit in Word.
   5. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
2. From a document located on your local storage:
   1. Locate the document on your local storage.
   2. Open the document.

      The document opens in Microsoft Word.
   3. Select the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in from the Home ribbon in Microsoft Word. If prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
3. After opening the agreement using one of these methods, follow these steps to access Chat in AI-Assisted Review:
   1. In the AI-Assisted Review window, log on to Docusign.

      The AI-Assisted Review window displays, with the Chat tab selected. An AI summary of the agreement you opened is displayed in a dropdown.
   2. Enter your questions, edit requests, or prompts in the Type to ask something... field. If needed, you can use a prompt from the Shortcuts section to start a conversation. To have the add-in refer directly to specific text when responding, highlight a clause or section text of the contract. Once a section has been highlighted, select the + icon for Add source > Use current text selection.

      Note: Use plain language for queries. Query result return times will vary, depending on the size of the contract being analyzed. To leave feedback for the AI-generated results, select ![Positive feedback](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/thumbs-up.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5ODAsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.PN73N3WZ_O_glMMOkPt0QCkiNVpv-IEeqYjPBZuSy9A&_LANG=enus "Positive feedback") to leave positive feedback, or select ![Negative feedback](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/thumbs-down.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5ODAsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.PN73N3WZ_O_glMMOkPt0QCkiNVpv-IEeqYjPBZuSy9A&_LANG=enus "Negative feedback") to leave negative feedback.

      Examples:
      - "When does the contract start?"
      - "Does this agreement automatically renew?"
      - "Are there any clauses for disclosures?"

      AI-Assisted Review returns the results of your query, including links to the sections of the contract where answers were found. Results can be expanded and selected to jump to sections of the contract that match the query.
   3. Once an answer to your question has been provided by the add-in, you can enter a follow-up question, query, or prompt related to the provided answer. To copy the answers or summaries that the add-in provides for your prompt, select the ![Copy Results](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Duplicate.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5ODAsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.PN73N3WZ_O_glMMOkPt0QCkiNVpv-IEeqYjPBZuSy9A&_LANG=enus "Copy Results") icon. To apply the add-in's suggestions for your prompt, select Apply Suggestion.

      Note: Queries and prompts can be conditional and call for multiple contract language changes. If there are multiple sections in which changes are applied, you will need to select Apply Suggestion for each suggestion.

      Examples:
      - "Does this agreement auto-renew?" can be followed by "Remove the auto-renewal and also change the term length to 1 year."
      - "Are there any late fees?" can be followed by "Remove all language around late fees for contract renewal."
      - "Draft a clause granting termination for convenience."
      - "Provide a summary of this entire agreement, focusing on scope of services, liability and indemnity, and any other key risks."
      - "Generate a summary of key payment terms in list format that I can send via email."

      The add-in displays the changed sections of the agreement according to the provided prompt. Changed sections are indicated in the agreement with strikethroughs and markup formatting. The add-in indicates that the suggested changes have been applied.
   4. To generate and add language to an agreement, enter the details you want to add in the Type to ask something… field.

      Note: Use language designed as commands for queries. Return times on suggestion results may vary, depending on the query provided and length of the document.

      Examples:
      - "Generate a Choice of Law Clause for California"
      - "Provide a Force Majeure Clause"
      - "Create a definition of Confidential Information"

      AI-Assisted Review generates and displays a suggestion based on the provided query.
   5. Review the suggestion(s) generated by AI-Assisted Review. To accept one of the suggestions, select Apply Suggestion.

title: Review Contracts Using the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Review Contracts Using the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text: Learn how to review contracts using the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. Once a playbook has been run, users can review suggestions and make alterations to a contract based on analysis results.

title: Review Contracts Using the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Review Contracts Using the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
Before you begin
text:
[Run a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=tsk4aa134b9-92cc-4c36-b5dc-18d2f2c1b006.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to run a playbook in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. Playbooks are collections of rules that can be configured to recommend markup and clauses in agreements. Once a contract has been analyzed by AI-Assisted Review, users can apply markup to the contract from suggestions made by the add-in.")

Once a playbook has been run, users can review suggestions for the selected contract. AI-Assisted Review can be used to substitute contract clauses and language according to playbook rules.

Note:

- Time to complete contract analysis using playbooks in AI-Assisted Review may vary. This is dependent on the size and complexity of the playbook and the contract being analyzed by AI-Assisted Review.
- AI-Assisted Review can only be used with DOCX files. Macros and content control are not supported in AI-Assisted Review, and may cause errors.

Agreement Desk users with the required permissions can access AI-Assisted Review in several ways.

1. From Agreement Desk:
   1. Select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
   2. Select a request to open it.
   3. Select the Documents tab.
   4. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzcsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.fG2j1wxo6GP5bb3DipYgB-y9y8z_Yc64vZyeTEpfo3w&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose Edit in Word. Or, open the document preview, and select Edit in Word.
   5. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
2. From a document located on your local storage:
   1. Locate the document on your local storage.
   2. Open the document.

      The document opens in Microsoft Word.
   3. Select the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in from the Home ribbon in Microsoft Word. If prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
3. After opening the agreement using one of these methods, follow these steps to review your agreement using AI-Assisted Review:
   1. Select AI-Assisted Review.

      The AI-Assisted Review window displays, and the document is ready for review by the add-in.
   2. Select the Playbooks tab, and then select a playbook to run.

      The selected playbook displays, including all rules that are part of the selected playbook.
   3. Select Run All to run the playbook.

      AI-Assisted Review analyzes the contract, and displays results once analysis is complete.
   4. Review the results of the contract analysis:

      - Needs Review indicates that a clause or section has not met the standards of a playbook rule. To resolve this result without making changes, select Resolve. To apply the provided suggestion, select Apply. To leave an inline comment, select the ![Add a Comment](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Add-Comment.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzcsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.fG2j1wxo6GP5bb3DipYgB-y9y8z_Yc64vZyeTEpfo3w&_LANG=enus "Add a Comment") icon.

iI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzcsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.fG2j1wxo6GP5bb3DipYgB-y9y8z_Yc64vZyeTEpfo3w&_LANG=enus "Add a Comment") icon.

   5. Once all changes have been made, you are ready to save your agreement. The applicable save method will depend on how you accessed AI-Assisted Review:

      - Users who access AI-Assisted Review using Edit in Word can select Save to Request. The document is saved back to Agreement Desk as a new version.
      - Users who access AI-Assisted Review using a document from local storage should select Save in Microsoft Word to save the document locally. Once the document is saved, it can be uploaded manually to Agreement Desk.
