title: Run a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Run a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text: Learn how to run a playbook in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. Playbooks are collections of rules that can be configured to recommend markup and clauses in agreements. Once a contract has been analyzed by AI-Assisted Review, users can apply markup to the contract from suggestions made by the add-in.

title: Run a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Run a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
Before you begin
text:
[Install the AI-Assisted Review Add-In for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=con7dae9192-c00f-4290-abb2-11b9068012b3.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to install the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.")

In the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk, playbooks are collections of rules that can be configured to recommend markup. Users can run playbooks to analyze contracts and agreements for discrepancies or issues. When contract terms deviate from a playbook rule, AI-Assisted Review will suggest markup to bring contract language into compliance.

Once a contract has been analyzed according to the rules in a playbook, suggested markup can be applied. AI-Assisted Review can make suggestions for sections of contract language, enabling faster agreement cycles.

Agreement Desk users with the required permissions can access AI-Assisted Review in several ways.

1. From Agreement Desk:
   1. Select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
   2. Select a request to open it.
   3. Select the Documents tab.
   4. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose Edit in Word. Or, open the document preview, and select Edit in Word.
   5. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
2. From a document located on your local storage:
   1. Locate the document on your local storage.
   2. Open the document.

      The document opens in Microsoft Word.
   3. Select the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in from the Home ribbon in Microsoft Word. If prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
3. After opening the agreement using one of these methods, follow these steps to run a playbook using AI-Assisted Review:
   1. Select AI-Assisted Review.

      The AI-Assisted Review window displays, and the document is ready for review by the add-in.
   2. Select the Playbooks tab, and then choose a playbook to
      run. To search for a playbook, select the ![Search](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/search.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Search")icon, and enter your terms in the search field. To pin a playbook, select the ![Pin Playbook](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/pin_favorite.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Pin Playbook")icon. To duplicate a selected playbook, choose Duplicate from the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Options")menu. tab, and then choose a playbook to run.

heading_path: Run a Playbook in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
Before you begin
text:

   3. Select Run All to run the entire playbook. To run a single rule, choose the rule, and select the ![Run this rule](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Run-All-Rules.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Run this rule") icon to run it.

      - To leave feedback for the AI-generated results, select ![Positive feedback](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/thumbs-up.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Positive feedback") to leave positive feedback, or select ![Negative feedback](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/thumbs-down.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Negative feedback") to leave negative feedback.
      - Playbook rules have five separate statuses: Needs Review, Passed, Not Run, Failed, and Resolved. To filter your playbook rules by status, select the ![Filter](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/filter-options.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5MzIsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.H290tBLSo6ZBhlxv1qUzQJoOJoWbZ6-s8vId6BJIAQQ&_LANG=enus "Filter")icon, and choose the checkbox for your chosen status filter. You can also sort playbook rules by selecting Custom order or Sort by status.

You have successfully run a playbook or rule through the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. The add-in displays results on playbook rules that pass or need review.

title: Delete a Playbook or Playbook Rule in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Delete a Playbook or Playbook Rule in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to delete existing playbooks or playbook rules in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. Playbooks are collections of rules that enable AI-Assisted Review to review and markup agreements.

Playbooks and playbook rules in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk can be deleted. Deleting a playbook means that it can no longer be run as part of AI-Assisted Review.

Note: Only certain types of user permission profiles have the ability to delete playbooks and playbook rules. For more information about user permission profiles for playbooks, see [Set Playbook Permissions for the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=tsk8b028ec5-3d65-45a6-aec6-6b3540565b75.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the permissions that are required for users and groups to use playbooks and Chat in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. User and group permissions determine playbook and Chat access in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.").

Agreement Desk users with the required permissions can access AI-Assisted Review to delete a playbook or playbook rules in several ways.

1. From Agreement Desk:
   1. Select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
   2. Select a request to open it.
   3. Select the Documents tab.
   4. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NzAsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.IiJ0sQiJ8FRYNWzCqW7H9FNtwuE4YdKHwCfe3_T5FHc&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose Edit in Word. Or, open the document preview, and select Edit in Word.
   5. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
2. From a document located on your local storage:
   1. Locate the document on your local storage.
   2. Open the document.

      The document opens in Microsoft Word.
   3. Select the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in from the Home ribbon in Microsoft Word. If prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
3. After opening the agreement using one of these methods, follow these steps to delete a playbook or playbook ruleusing AI-Assisted Review:
   1. Select Playbooks.

      AI-Assisted Review displays all available playbooks.
   2. Select a playbook.

      AI-Assisted Review displays all the rules for the selected playbook.
   3. Select your options:

      - To delete a playbook rule, select Edit, hover your cursor over the rule, and select the ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Trash.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NzAsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.IiJ0sQiJ8FRYNWzCqW7H9FNtwuE4YdKHwCfe3_T5FHc&_LANG=enus) icon.

title: Generate Playbooks Using the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Generate Playbooks Using the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to use the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk to generate playbooks. Playbooks are collections of rules that enable the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk to review and mark up agreements.

In AI-Assisted Review, Playbooks accelerate contract review and negotiation, empowering teams to manage lightweight review and negotiation without jeopardizing legal compliance. The AI-Assisted Review add-in can analyze your contracts and create playbooks and rules based on that analysis.

Note:

- Playbooks can only be generated from DOCX and PDF documents.
- Playbook generation in AI-Assisted review can only generate playbooks based on a single document.
- Playbook generation will use the first 100 pages of the uploaded reference document.

Agreement Desk users with the required permissions can access AI-Assisted Review for playbook generation in several ways.

1. From Agreement Desk:
   1. Select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
   2. Select a request to open it.
   3. Select the Documents tab.
   4. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NDQsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.pdBImVRisuKDABg8_1MQRLdk0P7S5tryZ9UKOnEK2dg&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose Edit in Word. Or, open the document preview, and select Edit in Word.
   5. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
2. From a document located on your local storage:
   1. Locate the document on your local storage.
   2. Open the document.

      The document opens in Microsoft Word.
   3. Select the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in from the Home ribbon in Microsoft Word. If prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
3. After opening the agreement using one of these methods, follow these instructions to generate a new playbook in AI-Assisted Review:
   1. In the AI-Assisted Review window, log on to Docusign.

      The AI-Assisted Review window displays.
   2. Select the Playbooks tab, and choose Generate Playbook.
   3. Select Upload File to choose an agreement from your local storage. Once an agreement has been chosen, select Generate Playbook.

      The selected agreement is uploaded to Docusign AI-Assisted Review. The add-in analyzes your contract and returns a generated playbook title, description, and a set of playbook rules, based on the contents of the uploaded agreement.
   4. Select your options for your newly generated playbook:

contract and returns a generated playbook title, description, and a set of playbook rules, based on the contents of the uploaded agreement.
   4. Select your options for your newly generated playbook:

      - To add a rule to your newly generated playbook, select Add Rule. For more information on writing playbook rules, see [Best Practices for Playbook Rule Writing in the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=fje1726766463553-fwcby1ke.html&_LANG=enus).
      - To edit any playbook rules in your generated playbook, select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NDQsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.pdBImVRisuKDABg8_1MQRLdk0P7S5tryZ9UKOnEK2dg&_LANG=enus "Options")icon, and choose Edit Rule. For more information on editing playbook rules, see [Edit Playbook Rules in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=tsk31bc3eb4-f708-42aa-ab14-983e1ab3cb37.html&_LANG=enus).
      - To re-order rules in your playbook, select and hold the ![Order Selector](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Gripper_Bar.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NDQsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.pdBImVRisuKDABg8_1MQRLdk0P7S5tryZ9UKOnEK2dg&_LANG=enus "Order Selector")icon, and drag the rule into the desired order.
   5. Once all changes have been made, select Save to save your new playbook.

You have successfully used the AI-Assisted Review add-in to generate a playbook based on an uploaded contract. The add-in displays an indication that your new playbook has been created. Your new playbook can be used on agreements by selecting Run All.

title: Export and Import Playbooks in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Export and Import Playbooks in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Learn how to export or import your organization’s playbooks in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.

Playbooks in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk can be exported or imported. Users with the correct permissions can export and import playbooks to create copies or migrate playbooks between environments.

Note:

- Only certain types of user permission profiles have the ability to delete playbooks and playbook rules. For more information about user permission profiles for playbooks, see [Set Playbook Permissions for the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd&topicId=tsk8b028ec5-3d65-45a6-aec6-6b3540565b75.html&_LANG=enus "Read about the permissions that are required for users and groups to use playbooks and Chat in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. User and group permissions determine playbook and Chat access in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.").
- When exporting playbooks, all playbooks and rules will be included in the export. Users cannot export a single playbook or edit playbooks outside of the add-in before importing them.

1. From Agreement Desk:
   1. Select the Agreements tab, and choose Requests.
   2. Select a request to open it.
   3. Select the Documents tab.
   4. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NzUsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.LISy6oPS3nmZwcXC9A78n-0z-HDr6nviY9162efcmd8&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose Edit in Word. Or, open the document preview, and select Edit in Word.
   5. Open the downloaded agreement in Microsoft Word, and if prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
2. From a document located on your local storage:
   1. Locate the document on your local storage.
   2. Open the document.

      The document opens in Microsoft Word.
   3. Select the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in from the Home ribbon in Microsoft Word. If prompted, log into the AI-Assisted Review add-in.
3. After opening the agreement using one of these methods, follow these steps to export or import a playbook using AI-Assisted Review:
   1. Select Playbooks.

      AI-Assisted Review displays all available playbooks.
   2. Select the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NzUsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.LISy6oPS3nmZwcXC9A78n-0z-HDr6nviY9162efcmd8&_LANG=enus "Options") menu, and choose your options:

      - To export multiple playbooks, choose Export Playbooks. To export a single playbook, select the playbook, and choose Export Playbook from the ![Options](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/mapfd7284e6-b699-4527-8651-a133914111fd/page/images/Overflow-Vertical.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDQ5NzUsInNoZWFmIjoibWFwZmQ3Mjg0ZTYtYjY5OS00NTI3LTg2NTEtYTEzMzkxNDExMWZkIn0.LISy6oPS3nmZwcXC9A78n-0z-HDr6nviY9162efcmd8&_LANG=enus "Options")menu. Select Copy to copy the code for the playbook.
      - To import multiple playbooks, choose Import Playbooks, paste the code for the playbook into the field, and select Import. To import a single playbook, paste the text from a single playbook export into the field, and select Import. Once the playbook or playbooks have been imported, select Close.

title: Set Playbook Permissions for the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
heading_path: Set Playbook Permissions for the AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk
text:
Read about the permissions that are required for users and groups to use playbooks and Chat in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk. User and group permissions determine playbook and Chat access in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk.

To use playbooks and Chat in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk, an account administrator must assign specific permissions to users. Playbook permissions can be granted to individual users or groups, and permission levels define access to playbooks.

Note: To manage or view playbooks, users must have a full IAM license.

1. Log on to your Docusign account.
2. Select the Admin tab.

   The Accounts view displays.
3. Navigate to Users & Groups, and select your options:

   - To set playbook permissions for users, choose Users.
   - To set playbook permissions for groups, choose Groups.
4. Locate the user or group you want to adjust playbook permissions for, and select Actions > Manage Playbook Access.

   The Playbook Access tab for the selected user or group displays.
5. Select the playbook permissions for the selected user or group from the Set permissions dropdown menu:

   | Playbook Permissions | Features in the Docusign AI-Assisted Review add-in for Agreement Desk |
   | --- | --- |
   | Can Manage Playbooks | - Create playbooks and playbook rules - View playbooks and playbook rules - Edit playbooks and playbook rules - Run playbooks and playbook rules - Delete playbooks and playbook rules - Can use Chat capabilities |
   | Can View Playbooks | - View playbooks and playbook rules - Run playbooks and playbook rules - Can use Chat capabilities |
   | None | - Cannot use AI-Assisted Review features |
6. Select Save Changes.

You have successfully set playbook permissions for the selected user or group.

AI is everywhere—but not every AI is built to understand the complexities of agreements. That’s where [Docusign Iris](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/ai) stands out.

Iris is the AI engine behind Docusign Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM). Purpose-built for agreements and powered by over 20 years of Docusign expertise, Iris helps you work smarter, faster, and with more confidence across the entire agreement lifecycle.

Whether you're reviewing contracts, managing renewals, or pulling insights from unstructured data, Iris brings intelligence to every step, turning agreements into a strategic advantage.

✨ **Key takeaways:**

- **AI that speaks your language:** Iris understands legal and business language, automating contract review, surfacing insights, and suggesting compliant clause language so you don’t have to start from scratch.
- **Reveal hidden insights:** With AI-assisted data extraction, Iris finds and standardizes critical contract data, unlocking new opportunities for efficiency, savings, and smarter decision-making.
- **Stay ahead of deadlines and risk:** From renewal reminders to obligation tracking, Iris helps you avoid missed commitments and flags risky clauses before they become costly issues.
- **Your data, your control:** Iris is built on Docusign’s commitment to trust. You choose whether your data is used for AI training. Any data used is aggregated and anonymized for your protection.
- **Evolving with your needs:** With new features like AI contract agents and smarter search in Docusign Agreement Manager - (formerly Navigator), Iris is constantly learning and growing—just like your business.

🔎 **Want to dig deeper?**

- Check out [this blog](https://www.docusign.com/blog/docusign-iris-agreement-ai) on Docusign Iris for a deeper dive into the updates.

This is a fantastic update—DocuSign Iris really feels like a powerful step forward in applying AI to real-world agreement workflows.

From our experience working with enterprise clients, many organizations—even those with dedicated contract management systems—still manually record contract start and end dates. Features like automatic extraction and reminders are not only more efficient, but also great for cross-checking and updating manually entered data.

For companies without a contract management system, the value is even more significant. Traditionally, they’ve relied on Excel spreadsheets to log key dates, which is time-consuming, error-prone, and lacks automated reminders. A solution like DocuSign Iris provides a streamlined, integrated approach that’s far more reliable and scalable.

Another use case is around contract clause identification. Many small and medium businesses don’t have dedicated legal teams, and being able to use AI to surface critical clauses gives them clarity on what to focus on—without needing to read every line in detail.

All in all, this is a great example of how AI can genuinely boost productivity and reduce risk, not just through automation, but by making agreement insights more accessible and actionable for all types of users. Looking forward to seeing how this evolves!

What are the legal implications associated with someone using the AI summary feature and signing a legal document?  I think it opens Docusign and the users up to significant liability when a signer signs that they’ve read the document but Docusign offers to summarize it in lieu of reading it, which is what the pop-up offering seems to be implying.  Even if you have a legal disclaimer, I want everyone who signs a legal document that I send them to read it, or if they choose not to read it at least they can’t rely on an excuse that I gave them a legal summary option using AI.  I’ve yet to read a legal document that had fluff language.  Every word of every line creates a contractual obligation.

Hi [@JL91942](https://community.docusign.com/members/mid-22372)—Thanks for bringing this up and welcome to the Docusign Community! The **Agreement Summary** feature gives signers a quick overview of key points in a document. It’s helpful for orientation, but doesn’t replace reading the whole agreement. If you’re the sender and you’d rather not include it, here’s what to do:

- Go to your **[Signing Settings](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&langSet=1&bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=lue1583277359885.html&_LANG=enus&_gl=1*1199yhl*_gcl_au*MjAwODUzOTg3MC4xNzUwNjQyMzI0)**
- Look under **AI Tools** in the **Signing Experience** section
- If your plan includes it, you’ll see an option to disable Agreement Summary

**More on how it works**
 Agreement Summary is powered by **Docusign Iris**, our AI assistant. It’s designed to save time and make the signing process more efficient.

- Iris uses AI to highlight key details in a document and surface them in the summary.
- Once AI generates suggestions, you get a chance to review them before they’re shared with signers.
- If something seems off, you can give feedback directly in the product.
- We’ve built in a review process to help ensure the AI returns relevant, accurate results.

Just like getting input from a colleague, we recommend reviewing the content to make sure it fits your specific use case. Docusign’s terms also ask that you verify all AI-generated output before using it. Let me know if you’d like help navigating the settings or if you have more questions about Iris!

**Ma. Cassandra** | **Docusign Community Moderator**
